task: Move the foil paper on the counter
raw:
Scene: foil_paper, table, robot_gripper
Step 1: reach(foil_paper)
  affordance_region: the crumpled foil paper on the table
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, foil_paper, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, foil_paper) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(foil_paper)
  affordance_region: the crumpled foil paper on the table
  contact: holding(foil_paper) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(foil_paper)
Step 3: transport(foil_paper -> new_location)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the new location
  spatial: above(foil_paper, new_location, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(foil_paper)
  done_when: above(foil_paper, new_location, 0.05)
Step 4: place(foil_paper -> new_location)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the new location
  contact: surface_contact(foil_paper, new_location) [completion]; released(foil_paper) [completion]
  pose: stable(foil_paper) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(foil_paper, new_location) AND released(foil_paper) AND stable(foil_paper)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the crumpled foil paper on the table
the crumpled foil paper on the table
an empty area on the new location
an empty area on the new location
steps.done_when: surface_contact(foil_paper, new_location) AND released(foil_paper) AND stable(foil_paper)
